columns.name: formulanumeric
columns.label: Formula (Numeric)
columns.formula: SUM(     CASE          WHEN {unit} IN ('12 oz Bag','2 oz Bag','5 lb Bag')          THEN NVL({quantitycommitted},0)         ELSE 0     END )

columns.name: formulanumeric
columns.label: Formula (Numeric)
columns.formula: CASE  WHEN {custcolcustcol9} = 'Not Roasted' THEN GREATEST(NVL({quantity},0) - NVL({quantitycommitted},0), 0) ELSE 0 END

columns.name: formulanumeric
columns.label: Formula (Numeric)
columns.formula: CASE  WHEN {custcolcustcol9} = 'Roasting' THEN GREATEST(NVL({quantity},0) - NVL({quantitycommitted},0), 0) ELSE 0 END

_note: Captured at end of Phase 5 smoke test; semantic column meaning by index: 0=item, 1=units (pack size string), 2=units sold, 3=units committed, 4=units not roasted, 5=units in roasting, 6=units to assemble
